evals.prompt: Run surface harvest QA on Risoluto at localhost:4000. Desktop only, both viewports. Build the full surface manifest and test every interaction.
evals.expected_output: Complete surface manifest with 200+ surfaces, each with terminal status (PASS/FAIL/FLAKY/BLOCKED/SKIP) at both 2560x1440 and 1920x1080. Coverage summary with per-route breakdown. Issues report with reproduction steps and console error attribution. Screenshots directory organized by route. Video recordings for multi-step flows.

evals.prompt: Run surface harvest on just the /settings page of Risoluto at localhost:4000. Test every interaction including developer tools, all field types, project picker modal, and hash deep-linking to #credentials and #devtools.
evals.expected_output: Targeted manifest covering ~30 settings surfaces. All field types tested (text, number, select, list, boolean, json, credential). Developer tools tested in all 3 modes (tree, path, raw). Delete override confirm modal tested (accept and dismiss). Project picker modal tested. Hash navigation verified for #credentials and #devtools. Console errors tracked per interaction.

evals.prompt: Load the existing surface manifest from the last run and re-test all FAIL, FLAKY, and BLOCKED surfaces. Skip surfaces that already passed.
evals.expected_output: Resume from checkpoint — reads existing session.jsonl and surface-manifest.md, identifies surfaces without PASS status, re-tests only those. Updated manifest with new statuses. Updated issues report. Coverage summary showing improvement from previous run.
